messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0119",
  "title": "益智解谜手游 投放趋势观察",
  "page_index": 63,
  "page_range": "63-64"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0120",
    "title": "恶作剧短视频+微恐/无厘头脑洞+现实还原游戏",
    "page_range": "64-65",
    "summary": "This section provides a retrieval-optimized overview of 2025 advertising strategies and market performance for puzzle/brain-teaser mobile games (益智解谜手游). It can answer queries regarding:\n- **Topics & Entities:** Puzzle mobile game ad creatives, popular gameplay mechanics (mahjong elimination, Sudoku, coloring, brain-teasers, line-connecting), and data sourced from the 广大大 (Guangda Da) ad creative and advertiser analysis modules.\n- **Dates:** January 2025 through December 2025.\n- **Procedures & Creative Formulas:** Standard ad material sequence: micro-horror/eerie BGM → unique prop display → intentional failure → real-world prop recreation → gameplay demonstration → download prompt. Future trend: direct use of in-game level footage combined with short-video prank hooks as standard traffic-driving methods.\n- **Tables, Figures & Metrics:** Two monthly trend visualizations for 2025: (1) Advertiser count and percentage of advertisers deploying new materials (monthly range: ~83.1%–89.2%, scale: 0–40K); (2) Monthly average active ad materials and percentage of new materials (monthly range: ~65.9%–76.1%, scale: 0–150).\n- **Claims & Evidence Types:** Claims that entertainment/casino mobile games lead all categories in YoY growth and image ad share, with gold, USD, and cash notes as the most attention-grabbing visual elements. Evidence is derived from platform analytics, monthly deployment data, and heat/popularity rankings.\n- **Retrieval Utility:** Optimized for questions on 2025 mobile game ad routines, creative trend forecasts, monthly advertiser/material activity rates, and high-performing visual hooks in gaming advertising."
  }
]

message.content:
This retrieval-optimized summary covers the parent section "益智解谜手游 投放趋势观察" (Puzzle Mobile Game Advertising Trend Observation, pp. 63–64) and its associated child content. It is structured to support queries on:
- **Topics & Entities:** Puzzle/brain-teaser mobile game advertising, core gameplay mechanics (mahjong elimination, Sudoku, coloring, brain-teasers, line-connecting), and analytics sourced from the 广大大 (Guangda Da) ad creative and advertiser analysis modules.
- **Dates:** January 2025 through December 2025.
- **Procedures & Creative Formulas:** Standard ad material sequence (micro-horror/eerie BGM → unique prop display → intentional failure → real-world prop recreation → gameplay demonstration → download prompt) and an emerging trend favoring direct in-game level footage paired with short-video prank hooks.
- **Tables, Figures & Metrics:** Two 2025 monthly trend visualizations tracking: (1) advertiser counts and the percentage deploying new materials (~83.1%–89.2%, scale: 0–40K); (2) monthly average active ad materials and the percentage of new materials (~65.9%–76.1%, scale: 0–150).
- **Claims & Evidence Types:** Claims that entertainment/casino mobile games lead all categories in YoY growth and image ad share, with gold, USD, and cash notes identified as the highest-attention visual elements. Evidence is derived from platform analytics, monthly deployment data, and heat/popularity rankings.
- **Retrieval Utility:** Optimized for questions regarding 2025 mobile game ad routines, creative trend forecasts, monthly advertiser/material activity rates, and high-performing visual hooks in gaming campaigns.

response_text:
This retrieval-optimized summary covers the parent section "益智解谜手游 投放趋势观察" (Puzzle Mobile Game Advertising Trend Observation, pp. 63–64) and its associated child content. It is structured to support queries on:
- **Topics & Entities:** Puzzle/brain-teaser mobile game advertising, core gameplay mechanics (mahjong elimination, Sudoku, coloring, brain-teasers, line-connecting), and analytics sourced from the 广大大 (Guangda Da) ad creative and advertiser analysis modules.
- **Dates:** January 2025 through December 2025.
- **Procedures & Creative Formulas:** Standard ad material sequence (micro-horror/eerie BGM → unique prop display → intentional failure → real-world prop recreation → gameplay demonstration → download prompt) and an emerging trend favoring direct in-game level footage paired with short-video prank hooks.
- **Tables, Figures & Metrics:** Two 2025 monthly trend visualizations tracking: (1) advertiser counts and the percentage deploying new materials (~83.1%–89.2%, scale: 0–40K); (2) monthly average active ad materials and the percentage of new materials (~65.9%–76.1%, scale: 0–150).
- **Claims & Evidence Types:** Claims that entertainment/casino mobile games lead all categories in YoY growth and image ad share, with gold, USD, and cash notes identified as the highest-attention visual elements. Evidence is derived from platform analytics, monthly deployment data, and heat/popularity rankings.
- **Retrieval Utility:** Optimized for questions regarding 2025 mobile game ad routines, creative trend forecasts, monthly advertiser/material activity rates, and high-performing visual hooks in gaming campaigns.
